title: Investigate suspected breaches of natural resource management legislation
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Investigate suspected breaches of natural resource management legislation demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Respond to advice of change in land use

pcs.text: Receive and record details relating to suspected change in land use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Receive and record details relating to suspected change in land use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Receive and record details relating to suspected change in land use.

pcs.text: Conduct pre-site inspection investigations in accordance with workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct pre-site inspection investigations in accordance with workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct pre-site inspection investigations in accordance with workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Report suspected breach of NRM legislation to agency authority
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report suspected breach of NRM legislation to agency authority?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report suspected breach of NRM legislation to agency authority.

pcs.text: Seek approval to proceed with investigation according to workplace authorisation procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek approval to proceed with investigation according to workplace authorisation procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek approval to proceed with investigation according to workplace authorisation procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Respond to advice of change in land use

elements.title: Carry out site investigation

pcs.text: Follow workplace health and safety policies and procedures when carrying out site inspections and investigations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow workplace health and safety policies and procedures when carrying out site inspections and investigations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace health and safety policies and procedures when carrying out site inspections and investigations.

pcs.text: Provide notification to stakeholders of the consequences of suspected change in land use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide notification to stakeholders of the consequences of suspected change in land use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide notification to stakeholders of the consequences of suspected change in land use.

pcs.text: Seek permission for site access from land owner to conduct investigation according to legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek permission for site access from land owner to conduct investigation according to legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek permission for site access from land owner to conduct investigation according to legislative and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Seek assistance from civil authorities where permission is refused according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek assistance from civil authorities where permission is refused according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek assistance from civil authorities where permission is refused according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Conduct interviews of witnesses and landholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct interviews of witnesses and landholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct interviews of witnesses and landholders.

pcs.text: Conduct site observations and collect evidence related to the suspected breach in land use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct site observations and collect evidence related to the suspected breach in land use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct site observations and collect evidence related to the suspected breach in land use.

pcs.text: Maintain records of interview and observations according to rules of evidence
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain records of interview and observations according to rules of evidence?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain records of interview and observations according to rules of evidence.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out site investigation

elements.title: Collate and assess site evidence

pcs.text: Check accuracy of collected site evidence against official land use documents and records
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check accuracy of collected site evidence against official land use documents and records?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check accuracy of collected site evidence against official land use documents and records.

pcs.text: Identify supplementary information to assist in making a fair determination
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify supplementary information to assist in making a fair determination?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify supplementary information to assist in making a fair determination.

pcs.text: Identify evidence indicating a possible breach in land use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify evidence indicating a possible breach in land use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify evidence indicating a possible breach in land use.

pcs.text: Evaluate volume and sufficiency of evidence and supplementary information for a determination
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate volume and sufficiency of evidence and supplementary information for a determination?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate volume and sufficiency of evidence and supplementary information for a determination.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Collate and assess site evidence

elements.title: Compile report on outcomes of investigation

pcs.text: Validate accuracy of evidence and supplementary information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Validate accuracy of evidence and supplementary information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Validate accuracy of evidence and supplementary information.

pcs.text: Consider the evidence against the possible breach in NRM legislation and make a preliminary determination
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consider the evidence against the possible breach in NRM legislation and make a preliminary determination?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider the evidence against the possible breach in NRM legislation and make a preliminary determination.

pcs.text: Prepare report with recommendations based on preliminary determination according to legislative protocols and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare report with recommendations based on preliminary determination according to legislative protocols and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare report with recommendations based on preliminary determination according to legislative protocols and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Present report and supporting documentation to agency authority according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Present report and supporting documentation to agency authority according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present report and supporting documentation to agency authority according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Compile report on outcomes of investigation

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
